task: Go to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eiffel_Tower and report the tower's height in metres and the year it was completed.

attempts.claimed_answer: The Eiffel Tower is 330 metres tall and was completed in 1889.

checked_claims.claim: The Eiffel Tower is 330 metres tall
checked_claims.observed: Wikipedia states: 'The tower is 330 metres (1,083 ft) tall'

checked_claims.claim: The Eiffel Tower was completed in 1889
checked_claims.observed: Wikipedia states the tower was 'designed and built from 1887 to 1889' and was 'constructed as the centerpiece of the 1889 World's Fair'

final_answer: The Eiffel Tower is 330 metres tall and was completed in 1889.
